title: Inspect, test and service starting systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect, test and service starting systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect, test and service starting system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Inspection, testing and servicing procedures are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are reported1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Inspection, testing and servicing procedures are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are reported1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Inspection, testing and servicing procedures are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are reported1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect, test and service starting system

elements.title: Inspect and test system

pcs.text: System and battery are inspected and tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Starting circuit is tested according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Inspection results are compared with manufacturer specifications2.4 Inspection findings are reported according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for required repairs or adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can System and battery are inspected and tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Starting circuit is tested according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Inspection results are compared with manufacturer specifications2.4 Inspection findings are reported according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for required repairs or adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can System and battery are inspected and tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Starting circuit is tested according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Inspection results are compared with manufacturer specifications2.4 Inspection findings are reported according to workplace procedures, including recommendations for required repairs or adjustments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect and test system

elements.title: Service system

pcs.text: System is serviced according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Post-service testing is carried out to confirm starting system is operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can System is serviced according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Post-service testing is carried out to confirm starting system is operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can System is serviced according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Post-service testing is carried out to confirm starting system is operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle, vessel or machinery is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recycle material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle, vessel or machinery is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recycle material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle, vessel or machinery is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recycle material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
